title: A district heating plant in operation for over 30 years: lessons in adaptation, survival and evolution
description: A practice abstract summarizing the development and long-term operation of the Rasen district heating plant in South Tyrol, Italy, highlighting its evolution in heat and electricity cogeneration using local wood biomass. It outlines the plant’s technical adaptations, sustainable forest residue sourcing, economic viability, and strong community acceptance over three decades.
